ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "initial_condition_norm" REAL /* Normalized initial condition value used in the simulation */,
  "deterministic_linear" REAL /* Output of the deterministic linear model */,
  "stochastic_nonlinear" REAL /* Output of the stochastic nonlinear model */,
  "cost_error" REAL /* Percentage of cost error associated with the simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the simulation was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the simulation */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the simulation was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the simulation purpose and methodology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type (e.g., Linear, Nonlinear) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  "is_stochastic" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the model is stochastic */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the model type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model type was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the model type */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the model type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation it belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the parameter */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the parameter was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, run) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation it belongs to */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Raw data output from the simulation */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., raw data, summary, visualization) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the result entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the result entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the result entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the result entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_metrics" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error metric */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation it belongs to */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error measured (e.g., cost error) */,
  "error_value" REAL /* Value of the measured error */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the error metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the error metric was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the error metric */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the error metric was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_metrics_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_metrics_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation it pertains to */,
  "input_description" TEXT /* Description of the inputs used in the simulation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model type used in the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the metadata entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the metadata entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metadata entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_metadata_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES model_types ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_metadata_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_metadata_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation it pertains to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the simulation */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version entry */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
